TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1975, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 5, André 3000, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux nya André ga htgan na ryax maki Amelika cowcyaco yatlanta. André ru Erykah Badu maki qutux laqi na mlikuy, Seven Sirius Benjami lalu nya.(htgan na ryax 1997 kawas 11 byacing 18 ryax ) yaya nya qutux hi mlahang Benjamin,mincyogun nya ga tbaziy ngasal. pinqbaqan nya André mqwas biru sa Sarah Smith pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. André mqwas biru sa Sutton pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. André mqwas biru sa Northside pqwsan biru seneng. André mqwas biru sa Tri-Cities pqwsan biru seneng. mintzyuwaw nya André hiya ga m'onggaku. maki sa kawas 1992, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na onggaku. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, an*r* ****, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qjanux nja an*r* ɣa ħtɣan na rjax maki amelika ʦ~ʨowʦ~ʨjaʦ~ʨo jatlanta. an*r* ru erjkaħ βa*u maki qutux laqi na mlikuj, s~ɕe*en s~ɕirius~ɕ βenjami lalu nja.(ħtɣan na rjax **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax ) jaja nja qutux ħi mlaħaŋ βenjamin,minʦ~ʨjoɣun nja ɣa tβazij ŋas~ɕal. pinqβaqan nja an*r* mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa s~ɕaraħ s~ɕmitħ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. an*r* mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa s~ɕutton pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. an*r* mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa nortħs~ɕi*e pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. an*r* mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa tri-ʦ~ʨities~ɕ pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. mintzjuwaw nja an*r* ħija ɣa mʔoŋɣaku. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na oŋɣaku. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: kawas tay 1975, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 5, André 3000, squliq na Bunge'. qyanux nya André ga htgan na ryax maki Amelika cowcyaco yatlanta. André ru Erykah Badu maki qutux laqi na mlikuy, Seven Sirius Benjami lalu nya.(htgan na ryax 1997 kawas 11 byacing 18 ryax ) yaya nya qutux hi mlahang Benjamin,mincyogun nya ga tbaziy ngasal. pinqbaqan nya André mqwas biru sa Sarah Smith pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. André mqwas biru sa Sutton pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. André mqwas biru sa Northside pqwsan biru seneng. André mqwas biru sa Tri-Cities pqwsan biru seneng. mintzyuwaw nya André hiya ga m'onggaku. maki sa kawas 1992, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na onggaku. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, an*r* ****, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. qjanux nja an*r* ɣa ħtɣan na rjax maki amelika ʦ~ʨowʦ~ʨjaʦ~ʨo jatlanta. an*r* ru erjkaħ βa*u maki qutux laqi na mlikuj, s~ɕe*en s~ɕirius~ɕ βenjami lalu nja.(ħtɣan na rjax **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax ) jaja nja qutux ħi mlaħaŋ βenjamin,minʦ~ʨjoɣun nja ɣa tβazij ŋas~ɕal. pinqβaqan nja an*r* mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa s~ɕaraħ s~ɕmitħ pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. an*r* mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa s~ɕutton pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. an*r* mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa nortħs~ɕi*e pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. an*r* mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa tri-ʦ~ʨities~ɕ pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. mintzjuwaw nja an*r* ħija ɣa mʔoŋɣaku. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na oŋɣaku. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
